backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a GPS unit report store with create, update, get, and getAll operations keyed by unitId+weekYear, using a variant UnitModel type and trapping on duplicate/missing entries.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three SheetJS/CSV import fix features (CDN replacement, file reading pipeline, per-file error handling) to their target files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of one-line summaries for every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and contents of each module.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the Vite/TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with dashboard, data-entry, and report routes wrapped in the Layout shell, plus a Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CSVImportSection: Collapsible file import UI supporting paste and file-upload modes for CSV/TSV/XLS/XLSX, with per-file error tracking, preview table, and bulk upsert submission.
frontend/src/components/DataEntryForm.ts: Manual bulk data entry form with dynamic unit rows, per-row validation, model/week selectors, and upsert submission with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component rendering a sticky header with logo and nav links, a main content area, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ModelSummaryCard: Displays a summary card for a specific GPS unit model showing aggregated stats (total packets, stored packets, valid GPS packets) with color-coded styling and progress bars for GPS fix rate and storage rate.
frontend/src/components/ReportFilters.ts: Renders filter controls (week navigator and model selector) for the report view, and provides a CSV export function that downloads filtered report entries with computed percentage columns.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyReportTabl: Renders a sortable table of report entries filtered by week and model, showing packet stats and color-coded GPS fix percentage badges, with a totals footer row and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/WeekNavigator.ts: A navigation component with previous/next buttons and a calendar display for stepping through ISO week labels, optionally constrained to a list of available weeks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, delegation validity checks, and exposing identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on GPS report entries against the ICP backend actor, along with utility functions for ISO week label parsing, navigation, and model label constants.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines a dark navy/amber OKLCH CSS variable theme, and adds custom scrollbar and utility component styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page that displays a week-navigable overview of GPS unit performance, including aggregate stats (total units, packets, GPS fix rate) and per-model summary cards.
frontend/src/pages/DataEntryPage.tsx: Data entry page providing both a CSV import section and a manual entry form for submitting weekly GPS unit packet data, with instructional UI elements.
frontend/src/pages/ReportPage.tsx: Report page that displays a filterable, week- and model-selectable table of GPS unit packet data with export support via ReportFilters and WeeklyReportTable components.
frontend/src/utils/csvParser.ts: Utility module that parses CSV/TSV text and Excel files (via lazily CDN-loaded SheetJS) into structured GPS packet row objects, with header detection and validation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based color tokens (navy, amber, semantic UI colors), custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing features for a weekly GPS unit runtest report generator. Serves as the source of truth for build planning across versions.
